name: Chilli Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop onions finely, chillies, and apples.
2. Add all other ingredients to a food processor one at a time.
3. Cook until tender by simmering gently on low heat.
Note: To make the sauce hotter, leave the seeds in the chillies. Doug prefers this version with hot Mexican chilies, fewer sugar additions, and the inclusion of onion and apple for a smoother texture. The cooking process takes about 20 minutes.
